instructions.message: Track all development, features, and decisions for the Command Center dashboard project
NO MOCK DATA EVER - Never display fake stats, fake comments, or fake activity. Show honest empty states with configuration instructions. Empty truth > Full lies
ACTIVITY LOGS FIRST - Before answering any question about the dashboard, READ data/agents/*.json files. Know what's logged. Never hallucinate features or status
LOG YOUR WORK - Every feature built, every fix made, every decision - log it in the appropriate data/agents/*.json file under 'developments' array
PRE-COMMIT CHECKS - Run mock data scan before every commit. Block any fake data from entering codebase

developments.message: Dashboard v1.0 deployed with KPI cards, TikTok/LinkedIn monitors, Eventbrite integration
Mock data purge - removed all fake stats, implemented Activity Logs system
Command Center v2 - New GitHub repo (ianmadrid9/command-center-v2)
Transcript Extractor converted to read-only log (chat-based workflow)
Created per-project activity log containers for honest tracking

insights.message: Honesty builds trust - empty states with truth > full dashboard with fake data
Every project/section needs its own activity log to prevent hallucination
